briefdescription.para: Minimum byte alignment requirement for descriptors to satisfy both hardware/software needs.
Minimum byte alignment requirement for buffer address in Micro DMA mode.

description.para: Register sets on TX and RX channels are identical

This register reports status of a DMA channel, including run/stop/idle state, errors, and interrupts (note that interrupt masks are shared with XAXIDMA_CR_OFFSET register, and are defined in the IRQ section.
The interrupt coalescing threshold value and delay counter value are also shared with XAXIDMA_CR_OFFSET register, and are defined in a later section.
These masks are shared by XAXIDMA_CR_OFFSET register and XAXIDMA_SR_OFFSET register

sectiondef.header: Bitmask and shift for delay and coalesce

description.para: These masks are shared by XAXIDMA_CR_OFFSET register and XAXIDMA_SR_OFFSET register
USR* fields are defined by higher level IP.
setup for EMAC type devices. The first 13 words are used by hardware. All words after the 13rd word are for software use only.

briefdescription.para: BD specific bytes to be cleared.
Total number of words for one BD.

sectiondef.header: Bitmasks and shift values for XAXIDMA_BD_MCCTL_OFFSET register
Bitmasks and shift values for XAXIDMA_BD_STRIDE_VSIZE_OFFSET register

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be read

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XAxiDma_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be written
is the 32-bit value to write to the register

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XAxiDma_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)
